art_style.primary: Chinese ink wash and watercolor drama illustration
art_style.technique: traditional Chinese sumi-e ink brush technique mixed with modern editorial fashion illustration

linework.type: Precise sharp thin black ink pen outlines
linework.contrast: high contrast between dark wet ink areas and light dry watercolor

coloring.method: very selective sparse watercolor color washes applied only to clothing and skin
coloring.white_space: large areas of pure white paper left untouched
coloring.ink_effect: subtle ink wash gradients on dark suit fabric

scene.background: minimal background with bank counter and glass partition lightly sketched

characters.clothing: lavender purple bow-tie blouse and white high-waisted pencil skirt
characters.hair: black hair in elegant updo bun
characters.action: standing at bank reception desk talking to teller

characters.clothing: dark charcoal suit with patterned tie, white dress shirt

quality.texture: subtle paper texture, wood grain texture on counter

mood.atmosphere: sophisticated mature Chinese TV drama atmosphere
mood.style_reference: premium Chinese web novel manhua illustration style

full_prompt: Chinese ink wash and watercolor drama illustration at a bank counter scene. An elegant slim Chinese woman wearing a lavender purple bow-tie blouse and white high-waisted pencil skirt, holding a small designer handbag, standing at a bank reception desk talking to a teller. Behind the glass partition, a young female bank teller in black suit uniform smiling. Behind the main woman, a heavyset stocky middle-aged Chinese man in dark charcoal suit with patterned tie, white dress shirt, hand on hip looking serious. Precise sharp thin black ink pen outlines with very selective sparse watercolor color washes applied only to clothing and skin, large areas of pure white paper left untouched, muted desaturated color palette of lavender purple and charcoal grey and warm wood brown, traditional Chinese sumi-e ink brush technique mixed with modern editorial fashion illustration, realistic human proportions and highly detailed facial features, minimal background with bank counter and glass partition lightly sketched, subtle ink wash gradients on dark suit fabric, wood grain texture on counter, clean crisp confident linework, high contrast between dark wet ink areas and light dry watercolor, sophisticated mature Chinese TV drama atmosphere, premium Chinese web novel manhua illustration style
prompt_template: {art_style.primary} at a {scene.location} scene. {characters[0].description} wearing {characters[0].clothing}, {characters[0].action}. {characters[1].description} in {characters[1].clothing} {characters[1].expression}. {characters[2].description} in {characters[2].clothing}, {characters[2].action}. {linework.type} with {coloring.method}, {coloring.white_space}, {coloring.palette} of {coloring.colors}, {art_style.technique}, {quality.proportions} and {quality.faces}, {scene.background}, {coloring.ink_effect}, {linework.quality}, {linework.contrast}, {mood.atmosphere}, {mood.style_reference}

usage_guide.how_to_customize: Thay đổi phần 'scene' và 'characters' để tạo cảnh mới với cùng style
